hero.title: Own Every
hero.description: From wardrobe confusion to confident outfits, StyleMirror AR helps you choose what to wear based on weather, season, skin tone, and your personal style.

story.heading: Two friends built this for fashion lovers
story.description: StyleMirror AR began when two friends kept asking the same question before every outing: “What do I have in my wardrobe, and what should I wear today?” They turned that daily struggle into a premium styling platform.
story.problemDescription: You want to go out, but choosing an outfit feels hard: you forget what is in your wardrobe, weather keeps changing, seasons demand different layers, and not every color flatters every skin tone.
story.solutionDescription: StyleMirror AR maps your wardrobe, understands weather and season, and recommends skin-tone matched looks so you step out quickly, confidently, and in style.

features.heading: Fashion intelligence
features.subheading: Every feature is designed to make your fashion choices smarter, faster, and more personal.

arTryon.title: AR Virtual Try-On
arTryon.description: See exactly how garments look on your body using WebXR augmented reality.

familyProfiles.title: Family Profiles
familyProfiles.description: Create style profiles for everyone in your family with individual measurements and preferences.

colorAnalysis.title: Color Analysis
colorAnalysis.description: AI analyzes your skin tone to recommend the most flattering color palettes.

smartRecs.title: Smart Recommendations
smartRecs.description: Personalized outfit suggestions based on your body shape, style preferences, and occasion.

bodyModeling.title: Body Modeling
bodyModeling.description: Upload photos to generate an accurate 3D body model for precise virtual try-ons.

priceComparison.title: Price Comparison
priceComparison.description: Find the best prices across hundreds of stores in real-time.

howItWorks.heading: How StyleMirror Works
howItWorks.subheading: Three simple steps to your perfect wardrobe

step1.title: Create Your Profile
step1.description: Upload photos to generate your AI body model and get your color analysis done in seconds.

step2.title: Browse & Try On
step2.description: Explore thousands of garments and instantly see how they look on your body model via AR.

step3.title: Shop Confidently
step3.description: Get personalized recommendations, compare prices, and buy knowing exactly how it'll fit.

cta.heading: Ready to revolutionize your wardrobe?
cta.subheading: Join 50,000+ fashion-forward shoppers using StyleMirror AR.

home.title: StyleMirror AR – AI Fashion Try-On
home.description: Try clothes in augmented reality with AI-powered body modeling and personalized style recommendations.

features.title: Features – StyleMirror AR
features.description: Explore AI try-on, body modeling, color analysis, family profiles, and smart recommendations.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy – StyleMirror AR
privacy.description: How StyleMirror AR collects, uses, and protects your personal data.

terms.title: Terms of Service – StyleMirror AR
terms.description: Terms and conditions for using the StyleMirror AR platform.

hero.title: Everything you need to
hero.description: StyleMirror AR brings together cutting-edge AI and augmented reality to transform the way you discover, try on, and buy fashion.

tryOn.label: Virtual Try-On
tryOn.title: See it on you before you buy
tryOn.description: Our IDM-VTON model renders garments on your exact body shape and skin tone, producing photorealistic results in seconds.
points: Generates video previews for motion realism
Accurate fit labels: tight, regular, or loose

bodyModel.label: Body Modeling
bodyModel.title: Your personal 3D avatar
bodyModel.description: Upload two photos and let our AI compute your precise measurements — height, chest, waist, hips, inseam, and shoe size.
points: Privacy-first: photos never stored without consent
Confirm or correct AI estimates at any time

colorAnalysis.label: Color Analysis
colorAnalysis.title: Colors that make you shine
colorAnalysis.description: We detect your skin tone (hex) and undertone (warm, cool, neutral) to curate palettes that flatter you — and filter out shades that clash.
points: Warm, cool, and neutral undertone detection
Personalized color palette per family member
Automatic filtering of avoid-colors in recommendations

familyProfiles.label: Family Profiles
familyProfiles.title: Style for everyone, in one place
familyProfiles.description: Add family members — spouse, kids, parents — each with their own measurements, preferences, and wardrobe.
points: Relations: me, husband, wife, son, daughter, mother, father
Individual avatars and style tags per member

dataCollected.heading: 1. Data We Collect
dataCollected.body: We collect information you provide directly (name, email, family profiles, measurements) and information generated by your use of the platform (wardrobe items, try-on results, wear events). Biometric data such as face and body photos are processed only with your explicit consent and are never stored permanently without your permission.

howWeUse.heading: 2. How We Use Your Data
howWeUse.body: Your data is used exclusively to provide and improve StyleMirror AR services: generating body models, running virtual try-ons, providing style recommendations, and sending notifications you have opted into. We do not sell personal data to third parties.

dataSecurity.heading: 3. Data Security
dataSecurity.body: All data is encrypted at rest and in transit. Authentication uses industry-standard JWT with RS256. Sensitive biometric data is governed by explicit consent records stored in our database. You may revoke consent and request deletion at any time.

yourRights.heading: 4. Your Rights
yourRights.body: You have the right to access, correct, export, and delete your personal data. Submit a request to privacy@stylemirror.ai. We will respond within 30 days.

contact.heading: 5. Contact
contact.body: For privacy questions, contact us at privacy@stylemirror.ai.

acceptance.heading: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.body: By accessing or using StyleMirror AR, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the platform.

license.heading: 2. License
license.body: StyleMirror AR grants you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to access and use the platform for personal, non-commercial purposes. All intellectual property rights in the platform remain with StyleMirror AR.

userContent.heading: 3. User Content
userContent.body: You retain ownership of content you upload. By uploading, you grant StyleMirror AR a license to use that content solely to provide the service. You are responsible for ensuring you have the right to upload any content.

prohibited.heading: 4. Prohibited Conduct
prohibited.body: You may not: use the platform for illegal purposes, attempt to reverse-engineer our AI models, upload content belonging to others without permission, or use automated scraping without written consent.

limitation.heading: 5. Limitation of Liability
limitation.body: StyleMirror AR is provided 'as is'. To the maximum extent permitted by law, we disclaim all warranties and limit our liability to the amount you paid us in the past 12 months.
